summary: P0 Story Video Pipeline Architecture Redesign VERIFIED. All endpoints working. Full E2E pipeline completes in ~100-110 seconds. Resume from checkpoint works. No blank pages at any point. Frontend shows Input→Processing→Done/Error phases correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: pipeline_engine.py: Stage-based architecture with 5 stages (scenes, images, voices, render, upload) - CORRECT
pipeline_engine.py: Per-scene checkpointing for images (lines 374-378) and voices (lines 465-471) - CORRECT
pipeline_engine.py: Exponential backoff retries with STAGE_CONFIG (lines 40-47) - CORRECT
pipeline_engine.py: Copyright check with BLOCKED_TERMS (lines 60-76) - CORRECT
pipeline_worker.py: 3 dedicated workers (NUM_WORKERS = 3) with queue - CORRECT
pipeline_worker.py: Stale job recovery on server restart (lines 113-125) - CORRECT
pipeline_routes.py: Instant job creation (<2s response time) verified - CORRECT
StoryVideoPipeline.js: 4 phases (input/processing/done/error) with proper state management - CORRECT
StoryVideoPipeline.js: Polling every 3 seconds (line 78) for status updates - CORRECT
StoryVideoPipeline.js: Auto-resume active jobs on page load (lines 40-54) - CORRECT
App.js: StoryVideoPipeline wrapped in ErrorBoundary (line 191) - CORRECT
context_for_next_testing_agent: New StoryVideoPipeline component fully functional. 5+ successful E2E pipeline runs completed. Resume from checkpoint verified (failed voice stage → resumed → completed in 28s). Video output URLs accessible and downloadable from R2 storage.

GET /api/pipeline/status/{job_id}.returns: full progress with stages, scene_progress, timing, output_url

POST /api/pipeline/resume/{job_id}.tested: Failed job at voices stage → resumed → completed in 28s

GET /api/pipeline/user-jobs.returns: list of user's pipeline jobs sorted by created_at

frontend_auto_resume.behavior: Page load detects active jobs and auto-resumes to processing phase

credits_handling.deduct: At job creation (50-120 credits based on size)

copyright_blocking.tested: Mickey Mouse, Disney → correctly rejected with 400
